title: Handyman Kauai
metaTitle: Handyman Kauai | Reliable Repairs & Home Maintenance | Ad Value Home Improvement
metaDescription: Kauai's trusted handyman. Repairs, maintenance, installations, and small jobs done right. No job too small. Serving all of Kauai — free estimates.
subtitle: Small jobs done right. Fast response, honest pricing, quality results.
imageAlt: Handyman tools and repair materials ready for a home project
intro: Finding a reliable handyman on Kauai can be frustrating. Ad Value Home Improvement offers skilled handyman services with the same care and quality we bring to our larger projects. Adam shows up when he says he will, finishes what he starts, and charges a fair price. From a leaky faucet to a broken fence rail — no job is too small.

highlights.title: Fast Response
highlights.description: We understand that repairs can't always wait. We prioritize urgent issues and respond quickly.

highlights.title: Skill Across Trades
highlights.description: Carpentry, drywall, painting, minor plumbing, general maintenance — one call, many skills.

highlights.title: Clear Pricing
highlights.description: No surprise invoices. We give you a clear price before we start any work.

highlights.title: Done Right
highlights.description: We fix it properly — not just good enough. Quality that holds up in Hawaii's climate.

schemaDescription: Reliable handyman services on Kauai. Repairs, maintenance, installations, and odd jobs for homeowners and property managers.
